Male Horoscope 6704 :
Often break in service
As said earlier, if the combination of Sani + Chandra + Ketu
exists in in a chart and also have an aspect of kuja from the 7th'
the native will experience often break in service/ profession.
Saturn is the Karaka profession and Ketu is Karaka for break.

94 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADJ AS1ROLOGY

Moon is Karaka for fickleness or unsteady mind. Since all these
3 planets are having an aspect of debilitated Kuja from 7 the
will have breaks. Since Sukra is Posited along with Sani the
native will earn little money. These planets will not give him a
specific/ significant profession.
Since Ravi +Jupiter are combined in Meena (North) the
father is a reputed person. Saturnthe significator of profession or
karma is combined with ketu the significator of standard I flag.
